title: Document Planner Output (v1)
description: Documentation-level canonical schema for Document Planner output in the gile-agents v1 pipeline. Mirrors the Document Planner → Reply Agent contract in agents/HANDOFF_CONTRACTS.md.

intent.description: Canonical institutional intent selected by the planner.

format_variant.description: Optional variant of the document format (e.g. strict_official, informal_internal).

confidence.description: Confidence score for the plan as a whole.

reasoning_summary.description: Short explanation of how intent and document_format were chosen.

sections.description: Ordered description of the high-level document structure.

purpose.description: One-sentence description of what this section should achieve.

required.description: Indicates whether the section must appear in the draft.

hints.description: Optional style/content hints for the section.

examples.description: Optional illustrative snippets for the section.

dependent_on_sections.description: Optional list of section IDs this section depends on.

draft_instructions.description: Guidance for the Reply Agent on tone, style, and constraints.

tone.description: Target tone for the draft (e.g. formal_institutional).

language.description: Expected drafting language before GILE (e.g. ka-GE).

constraints.description: Optional list of constraints such as length limits or mandatory phrases.

source_payload.description: Opaque payload preserving upstream Router data and any relevant context.
